HomeEngineering & TechnologyCivil, Environmental and Geotechnical EngineeringStructural EngineeringQuality Control in Road ConstructionQuality and its Control: Organization, Management, Assurance

Chapter

Quality and its Control: Organization, Management, Assurance
ByG. Jeuffroy, R. Sauterey, Michel Ruban
Book
Quality Control in Road Construction
Edition1st Edition
First Published2002
ImprintCRC Press
Pages19
Share
ABSTRACT

This chapter, while emphasizing the aspect of control, describes only very briefly the methods followed for achieving quality assurance. The bibliography given in the Annexure will provide the reader with more information in this field.

Next Chapter
